debt_findings.title: Potential for Code Duplication in Safety Warnings Component
debt_findings.detail: The `SafetyWarnings` component has a method `getSeverityClass` which is used to determine the class based on warning severity. This logic could be extracted and reused in other components where similar functionality is needed.

debt_findings.title: Potential for Code Duplication in Heatmap Component
debt_findings.detail: The `Heatmap` component has a method `getRatingColor` which assigns colors based on a rating scale. This logic could be reused to ensure consistency across different visual representations of ratings.

debt_findings.title: Potential for Code Duplication in Header Script
debt_findings.detail: The `initializeDarkMode`, `populateMenu`, and other functions across different parts of the application like `header.js` could benefit from extracting common logic to improve maintainability.
